name: Beijing Water Business Doctor Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Water Business Doctor Co., Ltd. engages in the industrial and municipal water supply business in China. It is also involved in the provision of sewage treatment, industrial production, sludge treatment, and garbage disposal facilities; sewage solutions for hazardous waste treatment plant; coking wastewater solution; petrochemical wastewater solutions; and provision of energy-saving equipment, as well as environmental protection equipment manufacturing activities. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
